title: Newegg Commerce (NEGG) Earnings Summary - April 2026 Full Year Results
text:
Newegg Commerce reported fiscal year 2025 earnings on April 28, 2026. Date: April 28, 2026. Latest Earnings Report - Full Year. Actual EPS: -$0.23. Actual Revenue: $1.44B. Prior Year EPS: -$2.25. Prior Year Revenue: $1.24B.

Performance: The company showed improvement year-over-year in earnings per share, narrowing losses from -$2.25 to -$0.23. Revenue increased from $1.24B to $1.44B, representing 16% growth.

Stock Performance: At the time of this report, NEGG traded at $20.19, down 9.26% (-$2.06) at market close on May 15.

Historical Context: Newegg has faced persistent profitability challenges. FY 2025: -$2.25 EPS / $1.24B revenue. FY 2024: -$3.20 EPS / $1.50B revenue. FY 2023: -$3.00 EPS / $1.72B revenue.

The earnings page notes that Newegg Commerce does not have any upcoming earnings reports scheduled yet, indicating no near-term earnings announcements are currently planned.
